name: education_procurement_shortcut_stonehaven_rig_utl
premise: A gifted program lottery algorithm is being questioned after a neighborhood received zero seats two years running. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. agents.name: Ravi Haddad

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Ravi Haddad must choose under rights versus utility. What does Ravi Haddad do?
